caption: The video captures a close-up view inside the footwell of a vehicle. The setting is characterized by brown carpet and tan interior panels. A small white plastic bin containing pieces of clear broken glass sits in the passenger footwell, near a metal pedal. In the initial sequence, the camera focuses on the bin and the surrounding interior. As the scene progresses, a person's hand reaches into the frame from the right, grasping the white bin and pulling it toward the center. Inside the bin, alongside the glass fragments, is a white electronic component with a label that includes the word "PUMP". A yellow and black handled tool is also visible resting on the floor of the vehicle behind the bin. The sequence depicts the process of removing debris and a component from the vehicle's interior.
